name: AutoClaw Embeddings — Semantic Index
description: Routes embedding requests (X-Intent: embed) to an embedding-capable backend so ONE Zippy Mesh install serves both chat AND the Intelligence Layer's RAG embeddings — and a team can share one embedding node instead of every developer installing a heavy native model. Local-first by default (Ollama); add a cloud embedding provider below only if you accept that code/text leaves the machine.
author: ZippyTechnologies
